title: Responsive Interface
description: Build a responsive multi-section webpage with semantic HTML5, CSS Grid, Flexbox, and vanilla JavaScript. No frameworks — master the fundamentals first.

title: REST API Backend
description: Design and build a Node.js REST API with routing, middleware, and error handling. Connect to a real database and understand HTTP deeply.

title: Database Design
description: Model data with PostgreSQL. Write migrations, seeds, and complex queries. Understand the difference between relational and document databases.

title: Deploy and Ship
description: Package your app with Docker, push to GitHub, configure CI/CD pipelines, and deploy to the cloud. Ship something the world can actually use.
